inputs.label: Driving Gear Teeth
inputs.businessContext: Number of teeth on the driving (input) gear.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of teeth on the driving (input) gear.

inputs.label: Driven Gear Teeth
inputs.businessContext: Number of teeth on the driven (output) gear.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of teeth on the driven (output) gear.

inputs.label: Input Speed
inputs.businessContext: Rotational speed of the driving gear in revolutions per minute.

businessContext_i18n.en: Rotational speed of the driving gear in revolutions per minute.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tahrik eden dişlinin dakikadaki devir cinsinden dönüş hızı.

inputs.label: Input Torque
inputs.businessContext: Torque applied to the driving gear in Newton-meters.

businessContext_i18n.en: Torque applied to the driving gear in Newton-meters.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tahrik eden dişliye uygulanan Newton-metre cinsinden tork.

inputs.label: Efficiency
inputs.businessContext: Efficiency of the gear pair in percentage (0-100). If not provided, assumes 100% (ideal).

businessContext_i18n.en: Efficiency of the gear pair in percentage (0-100). If not provided, assumes 100% (ideal).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dişli çiftinin yüzde cinsinden verimi (0-100). Belirtilmezse %100 (ideal) varsayılır.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
